author: PC Gamer
text:
Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance caps off Capcom's redemption arc with a 'massive' expansion in 2027
So many promising new lizard faces to hit with hammers.

author: PC Gamer
text:
1666: Amsterdam is still happening, and I'm downloading the demo as we speak
The Assassin's Creed spiritual successor has a free prologue available now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Star Wars Zero Company, the tactics game from veteran XCOM devs, confirms August launch and Anakin Skywalker cameo
Star Wars' new strategy game is looking like a winner.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sebulba and a whole bunch of other Glup Shittos appear in the first story trailer for Star Wars: Galactic Racer
Oh, there's a story? I was hoping it would just be racing.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Bandai Namco is pitting Gundams against kaiju in 2027
Gundam Rogue Orbit's enemies are definitely no Zaku, boy.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Guild Wars 3 announced, Steam page live now
The MMO takes place 1,000 years before Guild Wars, and promises a "one-of-a-kind movement system."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin is Platinum's next action game, and it's coming from Paramount's new games label
The debut game from Paramount Games Studio was revealed tonight at the Summer Game Fest.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Crossfire was the most surprising game reveal I've attended in years
A singleplayer tactical shooter helmed by ex-Naughty Dog devs is the most interesting game I've seen in a minute.

author: PC Gamer
text:

Hands-on with a 2-hour build of Control Resonant.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Tupac Shakur will appear in the next Yakuza game, Snoop Dogg reveals
Sega says it's treating the rapper's depiction with the "utmost respect for his legacy," without the use of AI.

author: PC Gamer
text:
It took 12 years but we finally got a teaser for Alien: Isolation 2
The xenomorph is on the hunt again.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Resident Evil – Code: Veronica remake announced
The 2026 Summer Game Fest showcase kicked off with another Resi remake.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Shadow of the Colossus and Ico creator Fumito Ueda's next game will let us pilot a giant robot head to take over mech bodies
I'm down for desolate, colossal robots.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Ubisoft's free-to-play Division shooter is coming to Steam
The Division Resurgence, originally announced as a mobile-only game, quietly dropped for PC on Ubisoft's storefront in April.

author: PC Gamer
text:
007 First Light's Land Rover ads cross the line from product placement to late-night infomercials
Dunrovin'.

author: PC Gamer
text:
As a fan of Lunacid and Bloodborne, I immediately fell in love with this first-person bugborne that cribs the best quick melee in PC gaming
In Hark the Ghoul, you're just a stinky undead bug doing its best.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Anthony Stewart Head, star of Buffy the Vampire Slayer, has died
The British actor was 72.

text:

Follow along for everything revealed during the 2026 SGF broadcast.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The console wars are back on, baby: Xbox CEO says 'we have to be very thoughtful' about console exclusivity on future releases
PC gamers may escape the direct impact of renewed hostilities, but we'll feel it.
